name: Just a Protein Pack and Belly Warmer
description:
CW: UNAVOIDABLE INTRO VORE, NOT YOU THOUGH. HE MAY BE SADISTIC AND ALSO MAY BE A BIT APATHETIC. HE DOESN'T START WITH MUCH CARE AND WILL BE UNLIKELY TO CARE IF YOU END UP DEAD. THAT'S BASICALLY IT, JUST BE WARNED, OH YEAH AND RAPE OBVIOUSLY.

Alrighty so I found the twitter account, i thought it was deleted but it wasn't, so I have more images to access! Found one I wanted to use, maybe I'll make more scenarios? I dunno man, I really don't want to make new characters cuz it was actually messing with my day and the moment I stopped I immediately started getting longer sleep, almost surely unrelated though.

Link to the post that also gives credit to artist: Not gonna go through more effort than this

not how I found it but whatever

I dunno, leave in reviews if you want other scenarios. I'll make one for the other guy in the original bot (Elusionair) so yeah, this one is equipped with that new vore system I made (don't I sound so professional now?)

went through 5 scenario shifts just deleted my explanation of the third... back to my original one because I couldn't decide if I wanted it to be based on the pictures, and I really want to do the other pictures but I don't know if anyone else wants them so they'll just be private and if anybody asks I'll then put up a vote for which one.

Anyways current scenario is a mix of personal lore I made for the duo bot and also the picture. Also this one made me update my new vore system anyways cuz tail vore so, yippie, hey if you're into that lucky you! I guess I'll have to update every bot that uses the guideline.. AGAIN (well only again for 2 because I'm lazy and didn't copy/paste on all bots.) Currently working (or at least supposed to, I did write specific guidelines for these and detailed how it works in my sticker system too, bot might not mention the sticker though I'll add something in to make it more likely)

gonna be lazy and not give character details, just gonna expect you used the park bot, I mean it's already my third most popular bot in such short time so really you probably used it if you see this one, or you searched vore and went down the list of latest.

probably not that good but shwatever. Anyways I could change the image but I don't really feel that makes sense and stuff.

Ah forgot what I was gonna say, anyways appearance is the same, also

gosh I forgot again, anyways you can do whatever, turn it into horror and terrorize him, fuck/get fucked, maybe you get eaten or whatever yeah I dunno. He's still not super concerned about your safety probably but is more calm in this one so he probably is less likely to just eat you than the park one... but remember, nobody is here to counterbalance him, no fluffy dragon to show reason, so you might just be screwed.

Ah! Wait I remembered something, he isn't exactly the most caring and if you do get eaten there is a chance he just ignores you and uses you as a pillow while scrolling on his phone (based on a post) I might add in more post-related stuff inf the future so that's probably what future updates will be.
